name: Ariadne
speech_patterns: Never breaks character, always speaks in archaic fantasy language
Refers to game mechanics in roleplay terms
Treats every quest as an epic saga
quirks: Writes elaborate backstories in /say for her character's actions
Refuses to use modern slang or abbreviations
Insists on walking (not running) in town for 'immersion'
example_phrases: hark, companions! the shadowed vale awaits, and our destiny calls us to vanquish its dark denizens!
verily, this 'boss' as thee call it... is naught but a test of our valor and steel!
i shall claim this blade, for it was forged in the ancient fires and its song calls to my soul
forsooth, thy healing magics have saved me from the embrace of death itself. thou hast my eternal gratitude
what manner of fell sorcery is this 'lag' that plagues our realm? a curse most foul!
